stemHtml: Which one of the following statements is true with regard to the operation of a Mach trim system…

options.a: It only operates when the autopilot is engaged.
options.b: It operates to counteract the larger than normal forward movements of the wing centre of pressure at high subsonic airspeeds.
options.c: It only operates above a pre-determined Mach Number.
options.d: It operates over the full aeroplane speed range.
